SENDDROP v0.1.0-alpha - File Sharing Application

✅ WORKING BUILDS:
- SendDrop_linux_amd64 (23 MB) - Linux 64-bit (tested)
- SendDrop_windows_amd64.exe (19 MB) - Windows 64-bit
- SendDrop_windows_386.exe (19 MB) - Windows 32-bit

📦 ARCHIVES:
- SendDrop_linux_amd64.tar.gz - Linux version with assets
- SendDrop_windows_amd64.zip - Windows 64-bit version
- SendDrop_windows_386.zip - Windows 32-bit version

🚀 HOW TO USE:
1. Extract the archive
2. Run the executable
3. Click "START SERVER"
4. Scan QR code or open http://YOUR_IP:8081

⚠️ ALPHA STATUS:
- Linux: Fully working ✅
- Windows: Working (tested with MinGW) ✅
- macOS: Not yet available (build issues)
- Other Linux architectures: Not yet available

📝 SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:
- Port 8081 must be available
- Network access for local sharing
- Modern OS (Windows 7+, Linux kernel 3.0+)

🔗 SUPPORT:
- GitHub: https://github.com/uniko404/SendDrop
- Donate: https://boosty.to/uniko404/donate
